title: Doirit`s Elemental Expansion
description: Enchant your items and make them elemental charged, travel to The Outest End Islands, explore new fortresses and much more
body:
### [WARNING]: modification will NOT work properly without texturepack. Please download it
## List of new features:
- New mechanic: Polishing ores. Now you need to polish diamonds or redstone dust before using it in crafting
- New decorative blocks: New varitions of ore blocks and stones, such as pillars, lamps or bricks!![ 1.3.1 New Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c7d83a4f0ae36a6ffde220bc2bb34ff7719e7fa3.png)
- New decorative blocks: Soul sandstone, crimson pearlstone, warped pearlstone, begite, yellowrite, obsidian, magmatic prismarine, necromantic prismarine, smoke prismarine, ancient prismarine
- New ores: Malachite and enderite. Enderite can be used as fuel to enchant your items, malachite is a very useful ingridient in new redstone components
- New dimension: The Outest End Islands. Travel to new lands through the upgraded end gates and find new block, biomes and structures!![The Outest End Islands](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c1bc03740a0dbef479e405a2ae7f7c25ebc40829.png)
- New functional blocks: Wax blocks, Teleporter, Redstone transistors, Blower, Destoyer, Swinger, Elemental enchanters
- New mechanic: Enchanting items through Elemental enchanters. Use elemental items, polished minerals and elemental books found in new structures to enchant your items and make them even more stronger with new enantments. But there is chance of losing your items, so be careful![Fire Enchanter]![Fire Enchanter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef6203eac347cc053be38481252ab846163bd5cd.png)(https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d0832cd738bbdb010bf4f2576074e2a1e975a8be.png)
- New mobs: Enderlings. Mutated versions of overworld monsters can travel to The Outest End Islands. There are 3 of them: Blastlings, Watchlings, Snarelings
- New mobs: Elemental creatures. Blaze-like monsters can be found in new elemental fortresses.
